headline: Quarterra and PGIM Celebrate Groundbreaking at Alexandria Crossing Apartments
summary: Quarterra, an industry-leading multifamily development and investment management firm, and PGIM, the global investment management business of Prudential Financial, Inc. and the second-largest real estate investment manager in the world, celebrated the commencement of construction on Alexandria Crossing at their groundbreaking ceremony earlier this month. thumbnail.caption: Institutional scale. Local expertise. Production-focused development. At Quarterra, we're building multifamily's most resilient, performance-driven platform, delivering high-quality living for residents while generating outsized returns for investors. All while carrying through on our unwavering commitment to excellence, one project and relationship at a time. (PRNewsfoto/Quarterra)
